Game.Name: Power Soukoban (Japan)
Game.plot: Power Soukoban is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Atelier Double and published by Nintendo,which was released in Japan in 1999.
Game.Notes: Taking control of a devil, you go through a series of mazes with the same goal in mind as SUPER SOUKOBAN. Pushing boxes (this time stones) to cover purple dots (this time pits). The modern twist? But of course, STAYING ALIVE. Staying alive? Yes, for from the excavation comes forth HELL’S ARMY!
